description: Wow, didn't know you could  have emojis in the title.
body:
If you do not download this mod you will be peculiarly inconvenienced by Evil Larry on october 31st at 11:30pm


![Evil Lary](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd1dfd4e9de84b89035d41a4261cdc19d8cef21c_0.webp)



This is a mod that adds a lot of things. Here is a list of all the stuff it adds:

entities:

boo cow, ostrich, herobrine? (not actuly herobrine), MCdownalds employee, milkrat, happy bunny, larva, ultamite cow, ultimente creeper (don't hug), fire fist, waffle house employee, fatman, skinnyman, ERROR 155, pink dragon, and UFO 

The mod adds mainly ultimate weapons and tools and boo cow weapons and tools. They shoot lightning and other projectiles and also MCdownalds, idk why. And some other stuff like some biomes, dimensions, and devices that are related to the entities and items. Also, some other boo cow items and an uncrafter that only works with some items. So, thats all the stuff in the mod.

Here is how to use everything:

1 The compressor:

The compressor is a block made where you can put in either a concentrated totem of undying witch makes a compressed concentrated totem of undying, a crucial ingredient for the boo cow essence or an ultamate ingot to make ultamte dust witch is an ingredient in almost everything in the mod.

2 The uncrafter

The uncrafter is well, an uncrafter it is currently unfinished and only works with some recipes but is being updated.

3 The Boo cow fabricator & Boo cow essence:

The boo cow fabricator is used to craft the boo cow essence
using this recipe:

![Boo cow essence recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c43bffae6c051c26fbc6e45b9fac8b14f9ac472.png)

it has a very late game recipe so don't expect to get it as soon as you join the world.

4 The boo cow sword & boo cow laser gun:

The boo cow sword does a ridiculous amount of damage and shoots a projectile that violently explodes on impact, shoots a trail of lightning behind it, and if it hits you you are launched 20 blocks in the air and die instantly also you cannot craft it you have to trade with a boo cow for it. The boo cow laser gun shoots a projectile that explodes on impact, shoots a trail of lightning and bounding solution, uses dirt as ammo, and cannot be crafted it will only apear in your hand when wearing the full set of boo cow armor

WARNING The boo cow laser gun is VERY destructive only use in areas that you are ok with looking like a syfy war zone and lagging your game like crazy

5 The boo cow armor & Boo cow toolset

The boo cow armor (and toolset) cannot be obtained via crafting you have to trade with a boo cow using boo cow ingots from boo cow ore to get them, you have to add the amount of boo cow ingots it would cost to craft the tool/armor for example to trade with a boo cow for a picaxe you would add 3 boo cow ingots. The boo cow toolset is VERY VERY efficient, it is so effecient that it is hard to not break 10 blocks when you click once with one of the tools and with the boo cow armor on it your basically immortal with it on it gives you many posetive effects.

6 The boo cow translator:

The boo cow translator allows you to translate the boo cows langauge and talk to them. when you start talking to a boo cow you can ask "how's it going" witch has you start talking to them or you can say "I would like to buy" witch then you can trade with the boo cow (trading explained in number 5)

7 Bounding solution

Bounding solution is needed to craft everything in fever dream, and can be obtained by going to the ultamate dimension. To get to the ultamate dimension you will need to craft the portal frame block wich will be unlocked once you have obtained the ultamate ingots.

8 The Water wand & Lava sword:

The water wand is a very powerful item, it shoots water that kills anything (exept for boo cows or herobrines) and its normal attack does 100 damage. The lava swords normal attack does 1000 damage and passivly shoots lightning while you are holding it and when right clcicked it will set the block 5 blocks in front of you to lava.

What to do if you come across a boo cow:

Please note that the boo cows are NOT hostile howevere they will attack if provoked, if you have a boo cow translator on you then walk up to the boo cow get close to it and right-click the boo cow translator facing away from the boo cow. That should open up a GUI that lets you talk to the boo cow or buy from the boo cow. Please note that the sell button currently does not work.

The [Issue tracker](https://github.com/TheCombatWombat123xD/Fever-Dream-Issue-tracker/issues) for this mod is here
 
(credit to [@Laudividni](https://www.youtube.com/@LaudividniYT) music
